name: GoMax Electronics Co., Ltd.
summary: GoMax Electronics, Inc. engages in the design, development, manufacture, and sale of audio and video systems in Taiwan. It offers SDI, DVI, converter, audio, HDMI, display port, and wall plate series products; and live streaming, optical extender, A/V over IP, video processor, pattern generator, and tool kit products, as well as legacy products. The company was founded in 2006 and is based in Zhubei, Taiwan.
